text:
### SCHEMA_VERSION
**Not bumped** — stayed at `1`. Both tables are pure additive `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS` with no alteration to any existing table, and `schema.rs`'s own header comment establishes that additive tables don't require a version bump (the version gate exists to catch breaking/destructive changes, not additions). Flagging this per instructions in case a concurrent main-line change also wants the version bumped — reconcile if so.
